title: Chinese Date Crumble Parfait
description: A unique dessert inspired by Chinese flavors, featuring a crunchy crumble topping and sweet date filling.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together crumble ingredients until well combined.
Spread a layer of pitted dates at the bottom of a parfait glass or bowl.
Top the dates with a layer of crumble mixture.
Repeat the layers until all ingredients are used up, finishing with a layer of crumble on top.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the crumble is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
